text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It's time for the Sapporo Kinen, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm? There's a decorative tree over in the
corner...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The name has a nice ring to it and all, but what's
it doing here?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it says here that the lilac is the official tree of
Sapporo.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ooh! This is a very auspicious omen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What are the chances that this lilac would be blooming now?! Lilac has the same amount of letters as "lucky", and they both start with l. This has to mean something!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O great gods of the north, I humbly accept this
blessing.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Grant us good fortune. And, if possible, some of
that famous Sapporo lamb barbecue too.
